weather: A powerful flow of water pulling everything along.
The massive pull of the moon moving water in and out.
A crushing blackness where no sunlight reaches.
Columns of golden light filtering down through the water.
Streams of air escaping from somewhere deep.
Billions of tiny organisms lighting the water with life.
A spinning vortex of water dragging everything toward its center.
A visible boundary where two temperatures collide.
Violent waves crashing far above, sending tremors below.
Living creatures painting the darkness with blue-green glow.
Water so calm and clear it feels like floating in glass.
as a school of fish swirls past
Thousands of silver bodies moving as one.
Water stained red by a bloom of tiny organisms.
Frozen sheets floating overhead, filtering the light.
as sand swirls in the current
Fine grains carried by the water, reducing visibility.
in water so clear you can see forever
Perfectly transparent water revealing every detail.
